meaning: n.凹版印刷,照相凹版,影印版
examples: Sheet fed Gravure Press, Plate Making Equipment etc.
One of the most prolific gravure idols around, Harumi Nemoto has been steadily pumping out DVDs and photo books since 2001.
She hasn't officially retired from the gravure idol scene, but her product output has dwindled significantly over the past couple of years.
